privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated users and assets injected via Snipe-IT API requests in setup_task.sh. The target users 'sharding' and 'dnedry', along with the target assets 'ASSET-KEY-004' (lost key), 'ASSET-KEY-009' (replacement key), and 'ASSET-KEY-015' (visitor badge) were confirmed to explicitly match the task description and setup scripts. Furthermore, the required custom fields (cut code '77421', access zone 'Zone B') and expected checkin date ('2026-05-01') are correctly mandated by the explicit requirements in the task.
